entry.title: New: BILL054(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO PUBLIC TRANSIT.

Amends certain provisions of ROH Chapter 15B related to the fare structure for Oahu's Multimodal Municipal Transportation System. Repeals and replaces the Fare Structure Table to, among other things, increase prices charged for certain passenger categories; incentivize the use of the HOLO card over cash fares; and establish a combined reduced fare category for the following passengers: Senior Citizens, Persons with a Disability, Paratransit Eligibility ID Holders, Medicare cardholders, and Individuals with Extremely Low Income (provided that the reduced fare for the monthly pass and the annual pass are only eligible to passengers who are Hawaiʻi residents). Increases the price of the special reduced term seven-day pass. Authorizes the DTS to establish a special event single ride fare for certain special events. Authorizes the DTS to establish a special single ride fare for transportation to and from the Daniel K. lnouye International Airport. Amends the fare amounts for individuals with extremely low incomes

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
